top_findings: robots.txt returns HTML — Angular SPA intercepts all paths including /robots.txt
HTTPS not enforced — http://explore21.com serves without redirect; www redirects to HTTP
No security headers — missing HSTS, CSP, X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options
Angular CSR-only (no SSR) — no server-rendered content visible to crawlers
Zero schema markup — no JSON-LD, no structured data of any kind
No backlinks — new domain (~5 weeks old), not in Common Crawl
Title tag 'BTC Insights' is brand-only — contains no target keywords
quick_wins: Create static robots.txt and configure Nginx to serve before SPA fallback (30 min)
Enable Cloudflare Always Use HTTPS and fix www redirect to https:// (15 min)
Add security headers via Cloudflare Transform Rules (20 min)
Rewrite title tag to include primary keywords (5 min)
Add og:image and Twitter Card meta tags for social sharing (1 hour)
Add WebSite + SoftwareApplication JSON-LD schema (30 min)
Remove user-scalable=no from viewport meta (5 min)

categories.name: Technical SEO
what_works: HTTPS on main domain via Cloudflare
Cloudflare CDN with fast TTFB (~92ms from SOF edge)

findings.title: robots.txt Returns HTML (Angular SPA Intercept)
findings.description: GET /robots.txt returns text/html with Angular SPA shell (HTTP 200). Googlebot cannot parse crawl directives. All well-known file paths (sitemap.xml, llms.txt, security.txt) return the same SPA shell.
findings.recommendation: Create /src/assets/robots.txt as a static file. Configure Nginx: location = /robots.txt { root /var/www/explore21/assets; try_files /robots.txt =404; }

findings.title: sitemap.xml Returns HTML
findings.description: GET /sitemap.xml returns text/html (200 OK). No XML sitemap exists. Google cannot discover or inventory site pages.
findings.recommendation: Create static sitemap.xml listing homepage and key tool pages. Serve like robots.txt. Submit to Google Search Console.

findings.title: HTTP Not Redirected to HTTPS
findings.description: http://explore21.com returns 200 OK over plain HTTP. No redirect to HTTPS. Users on HTTP are exposed to MITM attacks.
findings.recommendation: Enable Cloudflare 'Always Use HTTPS' in SSL/TLS settings.

findings.title: www Redirects to HTTP Instead of HTTPS
findings.description: https://www.explore21.com issues 301 redirect to http://explore21.com/ — downgrading from HTTPS to HTTP. This is a security vulnerability.
findings.recommendation: Add Cloudflare Redirect Rule: www.explore21.com → https://explore21.com${uri} (301)

findings.title: No Security Headers
findings.description: Missing: Strict-Transport-Security, Content-Security-Policy, X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy. Site is vulnerable to clickjacking, MIME sniffing, and protocol downgrade attacks.
findings.recommendation: Add via Cloudflare Transform Rules: X-Frame-Options: SAMEORIGIN, X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff, Referrer-Policy: strict-origin-when-cross-origin, HSTS: max-age=31536000

findings.title: Angular CSR-Only — No Server-Side Rendering
findings.description: Pure client-side Angular SPA. HTML shell contains only <app-root></app-root>. All meta tags are static — every page shares the same title/description. Googlebot must execute JavaScript to see any content.
findings.recommendation: Implement Angular Universal SSR (ng add @nguniversal/express-engine) or Angular 17+ built-in SSR. Minimum: implement Angular Meta service + Router-based meta tag updates per route.

findings.title: No Canonical Tag
findings.description: No <link rel='canonical'> found. Same content accessible via http://, https://, and potentially with/without trailing slash.
findings.recommendation: Add canonical tag to index.html. Update dynamically per route via Angular's Meta service.

categories.name: Content Quality
what_works: Meta description present and reasonable length (112 chars)

findings.title: Zero Indexable Content — JS-Rendered SPA
findings.description: HTML shell contains no visible text content. <app-root></app-root> is empty without JS execution. Crawlers without JS execution see no content whatsoever.
findings.recommendation: Implement SSR to server-render at minimum the homepage content.

findings.title: E-E-A-T Score: 18/100
findings.description: No Experience or Expertise signals. No About page, no team info, no data source citations, no contact info. Trustworthiness extremely low for a financial tool (crypto explorer).
findings.recommendation: Create About, Privacy, Terms, Contact pages. Add data source attribution. Consider adding team/founder information.

findings.title: Brand/Domain Mismatch
findings.description: Product is called 'BTC Insights' but domain is explore21.com. No brand alignment. Users won't remember the domain. AI systems will be confused about citations.
findings.recommendation: Either rebrand to align with domain (explore21.com) or acquire btcinsights.com or btcinsights.io.

findings.title: Missing Essential Pages
findings.description: No /about, /privacy, /terms, /contact, /faq pages with real content. All return the SPA shell. These are E-E-A-T signals and trust factors, especially for a crypto tool.
findings.recommendation: Create static content pages with 300+ words each. Start with Privacy Policy and About page.

findings.title: No Content Hub
findings.description: Tool-only site with no educational content. Competitors (mempool.space, blockchain.com) have rich blog/resource sections capturing long-tail traffic.
findings.recommendation: Create /learn or /blog with Bitcoin explorer tutorials and concept explanations.

findings.title: Weak Title Tag — No Keywords
findings.description: Title is 'BTC Insights' (11 chars). No target keywords. Does not describe page purpose to users or search engines.
findings.recommendation: Change to: 'Bitcoin Blockchain Explorer – Address & Transaction Lookup | BTC Insights'

findings.title: Missing og:image
findings.description: No Open Graph image. Shared links on Discord/Telegram/X show no preview. Critical for crypto community engagement.
findings.recommendation: Create 1200x630px branded image. Add og:image, og:image:width, og:image:height meta tags.

findings.title: Missing Twitter Card
findings.description: No twitter:card meta tag. X/Twitter shows no rich preview for shared links.
findings.recommendation: Add: <meta name='twitter:card' content='summary_large_image'> and related twitter:* tags.

findings.title: Missing og:url and og:site_name
findings.description: Open Graph URL and site name not specified.
findings.recommendation: Add: <meta property='og:url' content='https://explore21.com/'> and <meta property='og:site_name' content='BTC Insights'>

findings.title: Viewport Blocks Zoom — Accessibility Violation
findings.description: user-scalable=no and maximum-scale=1 prevent zooming. Violates WCAG 1.4.4 (Resize Text, Level AA).
findings.recommendation: Change to: <meta name='viewport' content='width=device-width,initial-scale=1'>

findings.title: Zero Schema Markup
findings.description: No JSON-LD, Microdata, or RDFa detected anywhere. No WebSite, Organization, SoftwareApplication, or BreadcrumbList schema.
findings.recommendation: Add WebSite + SearchAction schema (enables Google Sitelinks Search Box), Organization, and SoftwareApplication. See FULL-AUDIT-REPORT.md Section 4 for ready-to-use JSON-LD code.

findings.title: FontAwesome Synchronous Load — Render Blocking
findings.description: <script src='kit.fontawesome.com/...'> with no async or defer. Blocks rendering by 300-500ms.
findings.recommendation: Add defer attribute: <script defer src='https://kit.fontawesome.com/8a3442c427.js' crossorigin='anonymous'>

findings.title: Google Fonts via @import — Worst Loading Pattern
findings.description: @import url(fonts.googleapis.com) in inline CSS blocks CSS parsing, delaying FCP by 200-400ms.
findings.recommendation: Replace with: <link rel='preconnect' href='https://fonts.googleapis.com'> + <link rel='stylesheet' href='...'> in <head>.

findings.title: Angular CSR — JS-Gated LCP (3-7s on mobile)
findings.description: Largest Contentful Paint blocked until 460KB JS loads and executes. Estimated LCP: 3-7s on typical mobile connection.
findings.recommendation: Implement Angular Universal SSR to server-render first paint.

findings.title: Short Cache TTL on Hashed Static Assets
findings.description: max-age=63,675s (~17h) on hash-named JS/CSS files. Files with content-hash are safe to cache for 1 year.
findings.recommendation: Set Cache-Control: public, max-age=31536000, immutable for all *.hash.js and *.hash.css files.

categories.name: AI Search Readiness
what_works: Cloudflare CDN accessible by AI crawlers

findings.title: No llms.txt — AI Crawler Guidance Missing
findings.description: /llms.txt returns the SPA HTML shell (200 OK). No explicit RSL 1.0 compliance file for AI crawlers.
findings.recommendation: Create /src/assets/llms.txt with explicit allow rules and site description. Serve as static file.

findings.title: Uncitable — No Static Authority Content
findings.description: AI systems (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity) cannot cite this site reliably. No About page, no author attribution, no static explanatory content.
findings.recommendation: Create About page with 200+ words. Add Organization schema. Build static FAQ content.

findings.title: Brand/Domain Confusion for AI Citations
findings.description: AI systems would cite 'explore21.com' but the brand is 'BTC Insights' — confusing for users trying to find the cited tool.
findings.recommendation: Add og:site_name='BTC Insights', Organization schema with sameAs links.

findings.title: No Social Preview Image (og:image)
findings.description: No og:image means blank previews when links shared on Discord, X, Telegram, Reddit — all key crypto community platforms.
findings.recommendation: Create 1200x630px branded image. Add og:image and twitter:image meta tags.

phases.name: Phase 1: Critical Fixes
items: P1.1 Create static robots.txt and fix Nginx routing (30 min)
P1.2 Enable Cloudflare Always Use HTTPS + fix www redirect to https:// (15 min)
P1.3 Add security headers via Cloudflare Transform Rules (20 min)
P1.4 Create static sitemap.xml and submit to Google Search Console (30 min)
P1.5 Rewrite title tag with primary keywords (10 min)
P1.6 Add og:image (1200x630), og:url, og:site_name, Twitter Card meta (1 hour)
P1.7 Add WebSite + SoftwareApplication JSON-LD schema to index.html (30 min)
P1.8 Remove user-scalable=no from viewport meta (5 min)

phases.name: Phase 2: High-Impact Improvements
items: P2.1 Implement Angular dynamic meta tags per route (3-4 hours)
P2.2 Fix FontAwesome defer + replace Google Fonts @import (2 hours)
P2.3 Create About, Privacy, Terms, FAQ, Contact pages (8-10 hours)
P2.4 Create static llms.txt for AI crawler guidance (30 min)
P2.5 Fix static asset Cache-Control to 1 year (30 min)
P2.6 Set up and verify Google Search Console (1 hour)

phases.name: Phase 3: Content & Authority
items: P3.1 Implement Angular Universal SSR (15-20 hours)
P3.2 Implement route-level lazy loading to reduce main.js bundle (4-6 hours)
P3.3 Start link building: Bitcoin.org, CoinMarketCap, GitHub open-source
P3.4 Create 3-5 blog/learn articles targeting long-tail Bitcoin queries

phases.name: Phase 4: Monitoring & Iteration
items: Weekly Google Search Console review
Monthly PageSpeed/Core Web Vitals audit
Monthly security headers check (securityheaders.com)
Monthly backlink monitoring
Quarterly full SEO re-audit
